use_cases: Revealing contextual content or details when hovering over action items in a compact action bar
Creating an interactive toolbar with expandable panels that expand smoothly on interaction
Building a space-efficient navigation pattern where content expands inline rather than navigating to new pages
Implementing a dynamic disclosure widget for SaaS dashboards that shows related information on demand
Designing action-oriented UIs where users can preview content before committing to a full view
ai_summary: A dynamic expandable action bar component that uses Framer Motion for smooth spring-based morphing animations. The bar reveals content inline when hovering over action items, featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur effects. Each action has configurable dimensions that control the expanded state size, making it ideal for space-constrained interfaces where contextual content needs to be accessible without navigation changes. Commonly used in SaaS dashboards, dev-tools, and modern web applications requiring compact yet informative interaction patterns.
